news.t: BlackRock Strengthens Active ETF Platform with Two ETFs

holdings.infoBox: BELT is an equity ETF with a total of 20 individual holdings. The top holdings are Howmet Aerospace stock at 9.11%, Alphabet at 8.21%, Amazon.com at 7.83%, Broadcom at 7.52%, and Vertiv Holdings Co at 7.33%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Select Equity Active ETF (BELT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital growth by investing in US equities of any market capitalization and derivatives. BELT was launched on Jun 17, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock Strengthens Active ETF Platform with Two ETFs
